zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Worsley於大約1349年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德時，她的父親Geoffrey de Worsley32歲，母親Anabel de Haydock28歲。她和Lord John Massey至少有8個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1427年10月6日在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Worsley于大约1349年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾希普頓-德-維華德时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Worsley32岁，母亲Anabel de Haydock28岁。她和Lord John Massey至少有8个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1427年10月6日在英国英格兰爾可努恰福德享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Worsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Worsley in Lancashire or Worsley Farm in Rock (Worcestershire). The Lancashire placename may derive from an Old English personal name Weorcgȳth (genitive Weorcgȳthes) + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename may take its name from a lost stream-name Worf + Old English lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Worsley was born about 1349, in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey de Worsley, was 32 and her mother, Anabel de Haydock, was 28. She had at least 8 sons and 6 daughters with Lord John Massey. She died on 6 October 1427, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Worsley est née environ 1349, à Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Worsley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anabel de Haydock, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles avec Lord John Massey. Elle est décédée le 6 octobre 1427, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Worsley um 1349 in Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Worsley 32 und ihre Mutter Anabel de Haydock 28. Sie hatte mit Lord John Massey mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Oktober 1427 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Worsley è nata il circa 1349 nel Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Geoffrey de Worsley, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Anabel de Haydock, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie con Lord John Massey. Morì il 6 ottobre 1427, nel Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Worsleyが約1349年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアシュイプトン-ウンデル-ウイチウッドで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Worsleyは32歳，母Anabel de Haydockは28歳であった。彼女はLord John Masseyとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1427年10月6日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Worsley(이)가 대략 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 시프토-운더-w이ch우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Worsley(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anabel de Haydock(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Lord John Massey(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 10월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Worsley nasceu aproximadamente 1349, em Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey de Worsley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anabel de Haydock, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas com Lord John Massey. Ela faleceu em 6 de outubro de 1427, em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Worsley родилась около 1349 г. в местности шиптон-ундир-вичвуд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Worsley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anabel de Haydock, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Lord John Massey. Она умерла 6 октября 1427 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Worsley nació aproximadamente 1349, en Shipton-under-Wychwood, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey de Worsley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anabel de Haydock, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas con Lord John Massey. Murió el 6 de octubre de 1427, en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
